pairs.target: " rúguǒ zhèyàng jìxùxiàqù ,

pairs.english: who eat it in small quantities for a long
pairs.hanzi: 长期少量食用这种添加剂

pairs.english: time. The outcome seems almost inevitably to be cancer.

pairs.target: wài tuī de jiéguǒ yě shì rúcǐ .

pairs.hanzi: 但当进一步追问时，

pairs.target: jīhū rènhéshìwù tuī dào jízhì dōu huì ràng rén jǔsàng ,

pairs.hanzi: 几乎任何事物推到极致都会让人沮丧，

pairs.english: if not carcinogenic.

pairs.target: xìngyùn de shì , suīrán wài tuī shì kēhuànxiǎoshuō de yígè yuánsù ,

pairs.hanzi: 但它绝不是科幻小说的全部，

pairs.hanzi: 因为它过于理性和简单，无法满足

pairs.target: zhè běnshū búshì wài tuī xìng de .

pairs.target: rúguǒ nǐ yuànyì , nǐ kěyǐ bǎ tā
pairs.english: If you like you can read it,
pairs.hanzi: 如果你愿意，你可以把它

pairs.target: yǐjí xǔduō qítā kēhuànxiǎoshuō ,
pairs.english: and a lot of other science fiction,

pairs.hanzi: 迪克说）盟军在二战中失败了；

pairs.hanzi: 再比如说某事就是如此，

pairs.hanzi: 不必被牺牲，

pairs.hanzi: 也没有内在的死胡同；

pairs.hanzi: 思想实验的目的，

pairs.target: zhèngrú xuēdìngè hé qítā
pairs.english: as the term was used by Schrodinger and other
pairs.hanzi: 正如薛定谔和其他

pairs.target: wùlǐxuéjiā suǒyòng de nàyàng , bìng búshì wèile yùcè wèilái ——
pairs.english: physicists, is not to predict the future—

pairs.english: indeed Schrodinger's most famous thought-experiment goes to show that

pairs.target: zài liàngzǐ céngmiàn shàng , " wèilái "

pairs.target: shì wúfǎ yùcè de ——
pairs.english: cannot be predicted—
pairs.hanzi: 是无法预测的——

pairs.target: érshì wèile miáoshù xiànshí ,

pairs.hanzi: 而是为了描述现实，

pairs.target: dāngjīnshìjiè .

pairs.hanzi: 当今世界。

pairs.target: kēhuànxiǎoshuō bìng búshì yònglái yùcè de ;

pairs.hanzi: 科幻小说并不是用来预测的；

pairs.target: tā shì yònglái miáoshù de .

pairs.hanzi: 它是用来描述的。

pairs.target: yùyán shì yóu xiānzhī shuōchū de miǎnfèi ;
pairs.english: Predictions are uttered by prophets (free of charge);
pairs.hanzi: 预言是由先知说出的（免费）；

pairs.target: yóu tōnglíngzhě shuōchū tāmen tōngcháng shōufèi ,

pairs.hanzi: 由通灵者说出（他们通常收费，

pairs.target: yīncǐ zài tāmen de shídài bǐ
pairs.english: and are therefore more honored in their day than
pairs.hanzi: 因此在他们的时代比

pairs.target: xiānzhī gèng shòu zūnjìng ; háiyǒu wèilái xuéjiā yǒu xīnshuǐ .
pairs.english: prophets); and by futurologists (salaried).
pairs.hanzi: 先知更受尊敬）；还有未来学家（有薪水）。

pairs.target: yùyán shì xiānzhī de shìqíng ,
pairs.english: Prediction is the business of prophets,
pairs.hanzi: 预言是先知的事情，

pairs.target: tōnglíngzhě hé wèilái xuéjiā de shìqíng .
pairs.english: clairvoyants, and futurologists.
pairs.hanzi: 通灵者和未来学家的事情。

pairs.target: zhè búshì xiǎoshuōjiā de shìqíng .
pairs.english: It is not the business of novelists.
pairs.hanzi: 这不是小说家的事情。

pairs.target: xiǎoshuōjiā de běnzhí shì shuōhuǎng .
pairs.english: A novelist's business is lying.
pairs.hanzi: 小说家的本职是说谎。

pairs.target: qìxiàngjú huì gàosù nǐ xià zhōuèr
pairs.english: The weather bureau will tell you what next Tuesday
pairs.hanzi: 气象局会告诉你下周二

pairs.target: huì shì shénme yàngzi ,
pairs.english: will be like,
pairs.hanzi: 会是什么样子，

pairs.target: lándé gōngsī huì gàosù nǐ
pairs.english: and the Rand Corporation will tell you what the
pairs.hanzi: 兰德公司会告诉你

pairs.target: èrshíyī shìjì huì shì shénme yàngzi .
pairs.english: twenty-first century will be like.
pairs.hanzi: 二十一世纪会是什么样子。

pairs.target: wǒ bú jiànyì nǐ qù zhǎo xiǎoshuōjiā
pairs.english: I don't recommend that you turn to the writers
pairs.hanzi: 我不建议你去找小说家

pairs.target: huòqǔ zhèyàng de xìnxī .

pairs.hanzi: 获取这样的信息。

pairs.target: zhè búshì tāmen gāi guǎn de shì .
pairs.english: It's none of their business.
pairs.hanzi: 这不是他们该管的事。

pairs.target: tāmen suǒ zuò de yíqiè zhǐshì xiǎng gàosù nǐ
pairs.english: All they're trying to do is tell you what
pairs.hanzi: 他们所做的一切只是想告诉你

pairs.target: tāmen shì shénmeyàng de rén , nǐ yòu shì shénmeyàng de rén ——
pairs.english: they're like, and what you're like—
pairs.hanzi: 他们是什么样的人，你又是什么样的人——

pairs.target: fāshēng le shénme ——
pairs.english: what's going on—
pairs.hanzi: 发生了什么——

pairs.target: xiànzài de tiānqì rúhé ,
pairs.english: what the weather is now,
pairs.hanzi: 现在的天气如何，

pairs.target: jīntiān , cǐkè ,
pairs.english: today, this moment,
pairs.hanzi: 今天，此刻，

pairs.target: yǔshuǐ , yángguāng ,
pairs.english: the rain, the sunlight,
pairs.hanzi: 雨水，阳光，

pairs.target: kàn ! zhēngkāi nǐ de yǎnjīng ;
pairs.english: look! Open your eyes;
pairs.hanzi: 看！睁开你的眼睛；

pairs.target: tīng , tīng . zhè jiùshì xiǎoshuōjiā suǒshuō de .
pairs.english: listen, listen. That is what the novelists say.
pairs.hanzi: 听，听。这就是小说家所说的。

pairs.target: dàn tāmen búhuì gàosù nǐ nǐ jiāng huì kàndào shénme
pairs.english: But they don't tell you what you will see
pairs.hanzi: 但他们不会告诉你你将会看到什么

pairs.target: hé tīngdào shénme . tāmen zhǐnéng gàosù nǐ tāmen céngjīng
pairs.english: and hear. All they can tell you is what they have
pairs.hanzi: 和听到什么。他们只能告诉你他们曾经

pairs.target: kàndào hé tīngdào de ,
pairs.english: seen and heard,
pairs.hanzi: 看到和听到的，

pairs.target: zài tāmen huó zài zhège shìjiè shàng de shíguāng lǐ ,
pairs.english: in their time in this world,
pairs.hanzi: 在他们活在这个世界上的时光里，

pairs.target: qízhōng sānfēnzhīyī yòng zài shuìjiào hé zuòmèng shàng ,
pairs.english: a third of it spent in sleep and dreaming,
pairs.hanzi: 其中三分之一用在睡觉和做梦上，

pairs.target: háiyǒu sānfēnzhīyī yòng zài biānzàohuǎngyán shàng .
pairs.english: another third of it spent in telling lies.
pairs.hanzi: 还有三分之一用在编造谎言上。

pairs.target: " yǐ zhēnlǐ duìkàng shìjiè ! "——
pairs.english: “The truth against the world!”—
pairs.hanzi: “以真理对抗世界！”——

pairs.target: shì de , dāngrán . xiǎoshuōjiā , zhìshǎo zài tāmen yǒnggǎn de shíhòu ,
pairs.english: Yes. Certainly. Fiction writers, at least in their braver moments,
pairs.hanzi: 是的，当然。小说家，至少在他们勇敢的时候，

pairs.target: quèshí kěwàng zhēnlǐ :
pairs.english: do desire the truth:
pairs.hanzi: 确实渴望真理：

pairs.target: xiǎngyào liǎojiě tā ,
pairs.english: to know it,
pairs.hanzi: 想要了解它，

pairs.target: shuōchū tā , fúwù yú tā .
pairs.english: speak it, serve it.
pairs.hanzi: 说出它，服务于它。

pairs.target: dàn tāmen yǐ yìzhǒng qítè ér
pairs.english: But they go about it in a peculiar and
pairs.hanzi: 但他们以一种奇特而

pairs.target: qūzhé de fāngshì qù zuò , zhèzhǒng fāngshì jiùshì xūgòu rénwù ,
pairs.english: devious way, which consists in inventing persons,
pairs.hanzi: 曲折的方式去做，这种方式就是虚构人物，

pairs.target: dìdiǎn hé cóngwèi cúnzài yě yǒngyuǎn búhuì cúnzài de shìjiàn ,
pairs.english: places, and events which never did and never will exist
pairs.hanzi: 地点和从未存在也永远不会存在的事件，

pairs.target: huòzhě fāshēng , bìngqiě xiángxì ér
pairs.english: or occur, and telling about these fictions in detail and at
pairs.hanzi: 或者发生，并且详细而

pairs.target: rǒngcháng dì , chōngmǎn gǎnqíng dì jiǎngshù zhèxiē xūgòu de shìwù ,
pairs.english: length and with a great deal of emotion,
pairs.hanzi: 冗长地、充满感情地讲述这些虚构的事物，

alignment.english: with a great deal of emotion

pairs.target: ránhòu dāng tāmen xiě wán zhè duī
pairs.english: and then when they are done writing down this
pairs.hanzi: 然后当他们写完这堆

pairs.target: huǎngyán zhīhòu ,
pairs.english: pack of lies,
pairs.hanzi: 谎言之后，

pairs.target: tāmen huì shuō , jiùshì zhèyàng !
pairs.english: they say, There!
pairs.hanzi: 他们会说，就是这样！

pairs.target: zhè jiùshì zhēnlǐ !
pairs.english: That's the truth!
pairs.hanzi: 这就是真理！

pairs.target: tāmen kěnéng huì yòng gèzhǒng shìshí lái zhīchēng
pairs.english: They may use all kinds of facts to support
pairs.hanzi: 他们可能会用各种事实来支撑

pairs.target: tāmen de huǎngyán zhī wǎng .
pairs.english: their tissue of lies.
pairs.hanzi: 他们的谎言之网。

pairs.target: tāmen kěnéng huì miáoshù mǎxiēěr xī jiānyù ,
pairs.english: They may describe the Marshalsea Prison,
pairs.hanzi: 他们可能会描述马歇尔西监狱，

pairs.target: nà shì zhēnshí cúnzài de dìfāng ,
pairs.english: which was a real place,
pairs.hanzi: 那是真实存在的地方，

pairs.target: huòzhě bóluó jīn nuò zhànyì ,
pairs.english: or the battle of Borodino,
pairs.hanzi: 或者博罗金诺战役，

pairs.target: nàchǎng zhànyì quèshí fāshēng guò ,
pairs.english: which really was fought,
pairs.hanzi: 那场战役确实发生过，

pairs.target: huòzhě kèlóng de guòchéng ,
pairs.english: or the process of cloning,
pairs.hanzi: 或者克隆的过程，

pairs.target: zhè quèshí zài shíyànshì zhōng fāshēng .
pairs.english: which really takes place in laboratories,
pairs.hanzi: 这确实在实验室中发生。

pairs.target: huòzhě réngé de shuāituì ,
pairs.english: or the deterioration of a personality,
pairs.hanzi: 或者人格的衰退，

pairs.target: zhèxiē dōu zài zhēnshí de xīnlǐxué jiàocái zhōng yǒusuǒ miáoshù ;

pairs.hanzi: 这些都在真实的心理学教材中有所描述；

pairs.target: děngděng .
pairs.english: and so on.
pairs.hanzi: 等等。

pairs.target: zhèxiē kěyànzhèng de dìdiǎn , shìjiàn , xiànxiàng hé xíngwéi de fènliàng ràng dúzhě wàngjì
pairs.english: This weight of verifiable place-event-phenomenon-behavior makes the reader forget
pairs.hanzi: 这些可验证的地点、事件、现象和行为的分量让读者忘记

pairs.target: tā zhèngzài yuèdú yíbù chúncuì de xūgòu zuòpǐn ,
pairs.english: that he is reading a pure invention,
pairs.hanzi: 他正在阅读一部纯粹的虚构作品，

pairs.target: yíduàn zhī fāshēng zài
pairs.english: a history that never took place anywhere but in
pairs.hanzi: 一段只发生在

alignment.english: that never took place anywhere but in

pairs.target: nàge wúfǎ dìngwèi de qūyù ,
pairs.english: that unlocalisable region,
pairs.hanzi: 那个无法定位的区域，

pairs.target: zuòzhě de tóunǎo zhōng .
pairs.english: the author's mind.
pairs.hanzi: 作者的头脑中。

pairs.target: shìshíshàng , dāng wǒmen dú xiǎoshuō shí ,
pairs.english: In fact, while we read a novel,
pairs.hanzi: 事实上，当我们读小说时，

pairs.target: wǒmen shì fēngkuáng de ——
pairs.english: we are insane—
pairs.hanzi: 我们是疯狂的——

pairs.target: fēng le . wǒmen xiāngxìn nàxiē bìng bù cúnzài de rén zhēnde cúnzài ,
pairs.english: bonkers. We believe in the existence of people who aren't
pairs.hanzi: 疯了。我们相信那些并不存在的人真的存在，

alignment.english: the existence of people who aren't

pairs.target: wǒmen tīngdào tāmen de shēngyīn ,
pairs.english: there, we hear their voices,
pairs.hanzi: 我们听到他们的声音，

pairs.target: wǒmen hé tāmen yìqǐ guānkàn bóluó jīn nuò zhànyì ,
pairs.english: we watch the battle of Borodino with them,
pairs.hanzi: 我们和他们一起观看博罗金诺战役，

pairs.target: wǒmen shènzhì kěnéng biànchéng nápòlún .
pairs.english: we may even become Napoleon.
pairs.hanzi: 我们甚至可能变成拿破仑。

pairs.target: dāng shū hé shàng de shíhòu dàduōshù qíngkuàng xià lǐzhì jiù huì huílái .
pairs.english: Sanity returns (in most cases) when the book is closed.
pairs.hanzi: 当书合上的时候（大多数情况下）理智就会回来。

pairs.target: nánguài méiyǒu nǎgè zhēnzhèng shòu rén zūnjìng de shèhuì
pairs.english: Is it any wonder that no truly respectable society
pairs.hanzi: 难怪没有哪个真正受人尊敬的社会

pairs.target: céngjīng xìnrèn guò tā de yìshùjiā ?
pairs.english: has ever trusted its artists?
pairs.hanzi: 曾经信任过它的艺术家？

pairs.target: dàn wǒmen de shèhuì ,
pairs.english: But our society,
pairs.hanzi: 但我们的社会，

pairs.target: yīnwèi kùnhuò hé mímáng ,
pairs.english: being troubled and bewildered,
pairs.hanzi: 因为困惑和迷茫，

pairs.target: zài xúnqiú zhǐyǐn shí , yǒushí huì bǎ wánquán cuòwù de xìnrèn jìtuō zài yìshùjiā shēnshàng ,
pairs.english: seeking guidance, sometimes puts an entirely mistaken trust in its artists,
pairs.hanzi: 在寻求指引时，有时会把完全错误的信任寄托在艺术家身上，

pairs.target: bǎ tāmen dàngzuò xiānzhī hé wèilái xuéjiā .
pairs.english: using them as prophets and futurologists.
pairs.hanzi: 把他们当作先知和未来学家。

pairs.target: wǒ bìng búshì shuō yìshùjiā bùnéng chéngwéi xiānzhī ,
pairs.english: I do not say that artists cannot be seers,
pairs.hanzi: 我并不是说艺术家不能成为先知，

pairs.target: shòudào línggǎn qǐfā : línggǎn búhuì jiànglíndào tāmen shēnshàng ,
pairs.english: inspired: that the awen cannot come upon them,
pairs.hanzi: 受到灵感启发：灵感不会降临到他们身上，

pairs.target: shén búhuì tōngguò tāmen shuōhuà .
pairs.english: and the god speak through them.
pairs.hanzi: 神不会通过他们说话。

pairs.target: rúguǒ méiyǒu zhèxiē , shuí hái huì chéngwéi yìshùjiā
pairs.english: Who would be an artist if they did not
pairs.hanzi: 如果没有这些，谁还会成为艺术家

pairs.target: rúguǒ tāmen bù xiāngxìn zhèxiē huì fāshēng ?
pairs.english: believe that that happens?
pairs.hanzi: 如果他们不相信这些会发生？

pairs.target: rúguǒ tāmen bù zhīdào zhè zhēnde huì fāshēng ,
pairs.english: if they did not know it happens,
pairs.hanzi: 如果他们不知道这真的会发生，

pairs.target: yīnwèi tāmen céng gǎnshòu dào nèizài de shén tōngguò tāmen de
pairs.english: because, they have felt the god within them use their
pairs.hanzi: 因为他们曾感受到内在的神通过他们的

pairs.target: shétou hé shuāngshǒu zài biǎodá ?
pairs.english: tongue, their hands?
pairs.hanzi: 舌头和双手在表达？

pairs.target: yěxǔ zhī fāshēng guò yícì ,
pairs.english: Maybe only once,
pairs.hanzi: 也许只发生过一次，

pairs.target: zài tāmen yìshēng zhōng zhǐyǒu yícì .
pairs.english: once in their lives.
pairs.hanzi: 在他们一生中只有一次。

pairs.target: dàn yícì jiù zúgòu le .
pairs.english: But once is enough.
pairs.hanzi: 但一次就足够了。

pairs.target: wǒ yě búhuì shuō zhǐyǒu yìshùjiā
pairs.english: Nor would I say that the artist alone is
pairs.hanzi: 我也不会说只有艺术家

pairs.target: cái yǒu zhèyàng de fùdān hé tèquán .
pairs.english: so burdened and so privileged.
pairs.hanzi: 才有这样的负担和特权。

pairs.target: kēxuéjiā yě shì zhèyàng yígè zhǔnbèi zhe de rén ,
pairs.english: The scientist is another who prepares,
pairs.hanzi: 科学家也是这样一个准备着的人，

pairs.target: tā zài zuò zhǔnbèi ,
pairs.english: who makes ready,
pairs.hanzi: 他在做准备，

pairs.target: rìyè gōngzuò ,
pairs.english: working day and night,
pairs.hanzi: 日夜工作，

pairs.target: wúlùn shuìzháo háishì qīngxǐng ,
pairs.english: sleeping and awake,
pairs.hanzi: 无论睡着还是清醒，

pairs.target: dōu zài děngdài línggǎn . zhèngrú bìdágēlāsī suǒzhī ,
pairs.english: for inspiration. As Pythagoras knew,
pairs.hanzi: 都在等待灵感。正如毕达哥拉斯所知，

pairs.target: shén kěnéng yǐ jǐhé de xíngshì shuōhuà ,
pairs.english: the god may speak in the forms of geometry
pairs.hanzi: 神可能以几何的形式说话，

pairs.target: yě kěnéng yǐ mèngjìng de xíngtài biǎodá ;
pairs.english: as well as in the shapes of dreams;
pairs.hanzi: 也可能以梦境的形态表达；

pairs.target: jì kěyǐ zài chúncuì sīxiǎng de héxié zhōng ,
pairs.english: in the harmony of pure thought as well as
pairs.hanzi: 既可以在纯粹思想的和谐中，

pairs.target: yě kěyǐ zài shēngyīn de héxié zhōng ;
pairs.english: in the harmony of sounds;
pairs.hanzi: 也可以在声音的和谐中；

pairs.target: jì kěyǐ zài shùzì zhōng , yě kěyǐ zài wénzì zhōng .
pairs.english: in numbers as well as in words.
pairs.hanzi: 既可以在数字中，也可以在文字中。

pairs.target: dàn zhèngshì wénzì dàilái le máfán hé
pairs.english: But it is words that make the trouble and
pairs.hanzi: 但正是文字带来了麻烦和

pairs.target: hùnluàn . xiànzài wǒmen bèi yāoqiú zhī bǎ cíyǔ kànzuò yǒuyòng
pairs.english: confusion. We are asked now to consider words as useful
pairs.hanzi: 混乱。现在我们被要求只把词语看作有用

pairs.target: de wéiyī fāngshì :
pairs.english: in only one way:
pairs.hanzi: 的唯一方式：

pairs.target: zuòwéi fúhào . wǒmen de zhéxuéjiā ,
pairs.english: as signs. Our philosophers,
pairs.hanzi: 作为符号。我们的哲学家，

pairs.target: qízhōng yǒuxiē rén ,
pairs.english: some of them,
pairs.hanzi: 其中有些人，

pairs.target: xīwàng wǒmen tóngyì , yígè cí jùzi ,
pairs.english: would have us agree that a word (sentence,
pairs.hanzi: 希望我们同意，一个词（句子，

pairs.target: chénshù zhǐyǒu zài
pairs.english: statement) has value only in so far as it
pairs.hanzi: 陈述）只有在

alignment.english: only in so far as it

pairs.target: yǒu wéiyī hányì shí cái yǒu jiàzhí ,
pairs.english: has one single meaning,
pairs.hanzi: 有唯一含义时才有价值，

pairs.target: zhǐxiàng yígè lǐxìng sīwéi kěyǐ lǐjiě de shìshí ,
pairs.english: points to one fact which is comprehensible to the
pairs.hanzi: 指向一个理性思维可以理解的事实，

pairs.target: bìngqiě zài luójí shàng shì hélǐ de ,
pairs.english: rational intellect, logically sound,
pairs.hanzi: 并且在逻辑上是合理的，

pairs.target: bìngqiě —— lǐxiǎng qíngkuàng xià —— kěyǐ liánghuà .
pairs.english: and— ideally— quantifiable.
pairs.hanzi: 并且——理想情况下——可以量化。

pairs.target: ābōluó , guāngmíng zhī shén ,
pairs.english: Apollo, the god of light,
pairs.hanzi: 阿波罗，光明之神，

pairs.target: lǐxìng yǔ bǐlì zhī shén ,
pairs.english: of reason, of proportion,
pairs.hanzi: 理性与比例之神，

pairs.target: héxié , shùzì —— ābōluó huì ràng nàxiē guòyú jiējìn chóngbài tā de rén biànde mángmù .
pairs.english: harmony, number— Apollo blinds those who press too close in worship.
pairs.hanzi: 和谐、数字——阿波罗会让那些过于接近崇拜他的人变得盲目。

alignment.english: who press too close in worship
alignment.target: guòyú jiējìn chóngbài tā de rén

pairs.target: búyào zhíshì tàiyáng .
pairs.english: Don't look straight at the sun.
pairs.hanzi: 不要直视太阳。

pairs.target: qù hēiàn de jiǔbā lǐ dài yíhuìer ,
pairs.english: Go into a dark bar for a bit and
pairs.hanzi: 去黑暗的酒吧里待一会儿，

pairs.target: hé díéní suǒ sī hēbēi píjiǔ ,
pairs.english: have a beer with Dionysios,
pairs.hanzi: 和狄俄尼索斯喝杯啤酒，

pairs.target: ǒuěr wèi zhī .
pairs.english: every now and then.
pairs.hanzi: 偶尔为之。

pairs.target: wǒ tánlùn zhū shén ,
pairs.english: I talk about the gods,
pairs.hanzi: 我谈论诸神，

pairs.target: dàn wǒ shì gè wúshénlùnzhě .
pairs.english: I am an atheist.
pairs.hanzi: 但我是个无神论者。

pairs.target: dàn wǒ yě shì gè yìshùjiā ,
pairs.english: But I am an artist too,
pairs.hanzi: 但我也是个艺术家，

pairs.target: yīncǐ yě shì gè shuōhuǎngzhě .
pairs.english: and therefore a liar.
pairs.hanzi: 因此也是个说谎者。

pairs.target: búyào xiāngxìn wǒ shuō de rènhé huà .
pairs.english: Distrust everything I say.
pairs.hanzi: 不要相信我说的任何话。

pairs.target: wǒ shuō de shì zhēnhuà .
pairs.english: I am telling the truth.
pairs.hanzi: 我说的是真话。

pairs.target: wǒ suǒ néng lǐjiě huò biǎodá de wéiyī zhēnlǐ ,
pairs.english: The only truth I can understand or express is,
pairs.hanzi: 我所能理解或表达的唯一真理，

pairs.target: cóng luójí shàng jiǎng , shì huǎngyán .
pairs.english: logically defined, a lie.
pairs.hanzi: 从逻辑上讲，是谎言。

pairs.target: cóng xīnlǐxué shàng jiǎng , shì xiàngzhēng .
pairs.english: Psychologically defined, a symbol.
pairs.hanzi: 从心理学上讲，是象征。

pairs.target: cóng měixué shàng jiǎng , shì yǐnyù .
pairs.english: Aesthetically defined, a metaphor.
pairs.hanzi: 从美学上讲，是隐喻。

pairs.target: ò , bèi yāoqǐng cānjiā wèiláixué
pairs.english: Oh, it's lovely to be invited to participate in Futurological
pairs.hanzi: 哦，被邀请参加未来学

pairs.target: dàhuì , zài nàlǐ xìtǒng kēxué zhǎnshì qí hóngdà de mòrì túbiǎo ,
pairs.english: Congresses where Systems Science displays its grand apocalyptic graphs,
pairs.hanzi: 大会，在那里系统科学展示其宏大的末日图表，

pairs.target: bèi yāoqiú gàosù bàozhǐ měiguó
pairs.english: to be asked to tell the newspapers what America
pairs.hanzi: 被要求告诉报纸美国

pairs.target: zài 2001 nián huì shì shénme yàngzi ,
pairs.english: will be like in 2001,
pairs.hanzi: 在2001年会是什么样子，

pairs.target: yǐjí zhūrúcǐlèi de shìqíng ,
pairs.english: and all that,
pairs.hanzi: 以及诸如此类的事情，

pairs.target: dàn zhè shì gè kěpà de cuòwù .
pairs.english: but it's a terrible mistake.
pairs.hanzi: 但这是个可怕的错误。

pairs.target: wǒ xiě kēhuànxiǎoshuō ,
pairs.english: I write science fiction,
pairs.hanzi: 我写科幻小说，

pairs.target: ér kēhuànxiǎoshuō bìng búshì guānyú wèilái de .
pairs.english: and science fiction isn't about the future.
pairs.hanzi: 而科幻小说并不是关于未来的。

pairs.target: wǒ duì wèilái de liǎojiě bìngbùbǐ
pairs.english: I don't know any more about the future than
pairs.hanzi: 我对未来的了解并不比

pairs.target: nǐ duō , shènzhì hěn kěnéng hái bùrú nǐ .
pairs.english: you do, and very likely less.
pairs.hanzi: 你多，甚至很可能还不如你。

pairs.target: zhè běnshū búshì guānyú wèilái de .
pairs.english: This book is not about the future.
pairs.hanzi: 这本书不是关于未来的。

pairs.target: shì de , tā yì kāishǐ jiù xuānbù gùshì fāshēng zài
pairs.english: Yes, it begins by announcing that it's set in the
pairs.hanzi: 是的，它一开始就宣布故事发生在

pairs.target: " yǔzhòu tóngméng jìyuán 1490-97 nián ,
pairs.english: ‘Ekumenical Year 1490-97,
pairs.hanzi: “宇宙同盟纪元1490-97年，

pairs.target: " dàn nǐ kěndìng búhuì zhēnde xiāngxìn ba ?
pairs.english: ’ but surely you don't believe that?
pairs.hanzi: ”但你肯定不会真的相信吧？

pairs.target: méicuò , shū zhōng de rén quèshí shì cíxióngtóngtǐ ,
pairs.english: Yes, indeed the people in it are androgynous,
pairs.hanzi: 没错，书中的人确实是雌雄同体，

pairs.target: dàn zhè bìng bú yìwèizhe wǒ zài yùyán zài
pairs.english: but that doesn't mean that I'm predicting that in
pairs.hanzi: 但这并不意味着我在预言在

pairs.target: yìqiānnián zuǒyòu hòu wǒmen dōu huì biànchéng cíxióngtóngtǐ ,
pairs.english: a millennium or so we will all be androgynous,
pairs.hanzi: 一千年左右后我们都会变成雌雄同体，

pairs.target: huòzhě xuānchēng wǒ rènwéi wǒmen lǐyìng
pairs.english: or announcing that I think we damned well ought
pairs.hanzi: 或者宣称我认为我们理应

pairs.target: chéngwéi cíxióngtóngtǐ .
pairs.english: to be androgynous.
pairs.hanzi: 成为雌雄同体。

pairs.target: wǒ zhǐshì guānchá ,
pairs.english: I'm merely observing,
pairs.hanzi: 我只是观察，

pairs.target: yǐ yìzhǒng tèshū de ,
pairs.english: in the peculiar,
pairs.hanzi: 以一种特殊的，

pairs.target: qūzhé ér fùyǒu sīxiǎng shíyàn sècǎi de kēhuàn fāngshì ,
pairs.english: devious, and thought-experimental manner proper to science fiction,
pairs.hanzi: 曲折而富有思想实验色彩的科幻方式，

pairs.target: jí rúguǒ nǐ zài mǒuxiē qítè de
pairs.english: that if you look at us at certain odd
pairs.hanzi: 即如果你在某些奇特的

pairs.target: shíkè hé mǒuxiē tiānqì xià kàn wǒmen ,
pairs.english: times of day in certain weathers,
pairs.hanzi: 时刻和某些天气下看我们，

pairs.target: wǒmen qíshí yǐjīng shì le .
pairs.english: we already are.
pairs.hanzi: 我们其实已经是了。

pairs.target: wǒ búshì zài yùyán ,
pairs.english: I am not predicting,
pairs.hanzi: 我不是在预言，

pairs.target: yě búshì zài guīdìng . wǒ zhǐshì zài miáoshù .
pairs.english: or prescribing. I am describing.
pairs.hanzi: 也不是在规定。我只是在描述。

pairs.target: wǒ zhèngzài yǐ
pairs.english: I am describing certain aspects of psychological reality in
pairs.hanzi: 我正在以

pairs.target: xiǎoshuōjiā de fāngshì ,
pairs.english: the novelist's way,
pairs.hanzi: 小说家的方式，

pairs.target: tōngguò biānzào xiángjìn de huǎngyán lái shíxiàn .
pairs.english: which is by inventing elaborately circumstantial lies.
pairs.hanzi: 通过编造详尽的谎言来实现。

pairs.target: zài yuèdú xiǎoshuō shí ,
pairs.english: In reading a novel,
pairs.hanzi: 在阅读小说时，

pairs.target: rènhé xiǎoshuō , wǒmen dōu bìxū qīngchǔ dì zhīdào zhěnggè
pairs.english: any novel, we have to know perfectly well that the whole
pairs.hanzi: 任何小说，我们都必须清楚地知道整个

pairs.target: gùshì qíshí dōu shì húchě ,
pairs.english: thing is nonsense,
pairs.hanzi: 故事其实都是胡扯，

pairs.target: dàn zài yuèdú shí ,
pairs.english: and then, while reading,
pairs.hanzi: 但在阅读时，

pairs.target: què yào xiāngxìn qízhōng de měi yígè zì .
pairs.english: believe every word of it.
pairs.hanzi: 却要相信其中的每一个字。

pairs.target: zuìhòu , dāng wǒmen dúwán tā shí ,
pairs.english: Finally, when we're done with it,
pairs.hanzi: 最后，当我们读完它时，

pairs.target: wǒmen kěnéng huì fāxiàn ——
pairs.english: we may find—
pairs.hanzi: 我们可能会发现——

pairs.target: rúguǒ zhè shì yìběn hǎo xiǎoshuō ——
pairs.english: if it's a good novel—
pairs.hanzi: 如果这是一本好小说——

pairs.target: wǒmen hé yǐqián yǒuxiē bùtóng
pairs.english: that we're a bit different from what we were
pairs.hanzi: 我们和以前有些不同

pairs.target: zài wǒmen dú tā zhīqián ,
pairs.english: before we read it,
pairs.hanzi: 在我们读它之前，

pairs.target: wǒmen yǐjīng yǒu le yìdiǎn gǎibiàn ,
pairs.english: that we have been changed a little,
pairs.hanzi: 我们已经有了一点改变，

pairs.target: jiù xiàng yùjiàn le yígè xīnmiànkǒng ,
pairs.english: as if by having met a new face,
pairs.hanzi: 就像遇见了一个新面孔，

pairs.target: zǒuguò le yìtiáo wǒmen cóngwèi zǒuguò de jiēdào .
pairs.english: crossed a street we never crossed before.

meta.synopsis: The author discusses the nature of science fiction, emphasizing that it is not about prediction but about exploring reality through metaphor and thought-experiment. She sets the stage for the novel's approach to truth, fiction, and the imaginative process.
